base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of question_block_pulse — a tile from 1985 super mario bros. '?' glyph brightens from dim orange to full yellow and back. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame color-pulse cycle — '?' glyph brightens from dim orange to full yellow and back; plays continuously while block is active (pre-hit)
